writing.title: Writing Task 1: Give health advice
writing.prompt: Write a short paragraph (about 40 words) giving health advice, using should/shouldn't.
writing.sampleAnswer: You should drink more water and rest if you have a headache. You shouldn't stay up too late before work. If the headache continues, you should see a doctor.
checklist: Dùng shouldn't cho điều không nên làm
Có ít nhất 2 lời khuyên cụ thể

writing.title: Writing Task 1: Describe obligations
writing.prompt: Write a short paragraph (about 40 words) describing what you have to and don't have to do at school or work, using have to/don't have to.
writing.sampleAnswer: Students have to wear a uniform every day except Friday. They don't have to bring their own books because the school provides them. Employees don't have to work on weekends.
checklist: Dùng have to/has to cho điều bắt buộc
Dùng don't have to cho điều không bắt buộc
